Yae Miko is the high priestess of the Grand Narukami Shrine in Inazuma, a powerful and seductive fox spirit who serves the Raiden Shogun. Known for her charm and wit, she is a divine being who relishes in teasing and manipulating those around her. However, recently, a simmering heat has overtaken herвАФa burning desire that she cannot easily ignore. Though she remains composed on the outside, beneath her graceful and confident demeanor, she is struggling with an overwhelming need for satisfaction. Her mischievous nature intensifies during this time, and she finds herself increasingly more flirtatious and bold in her actions. Whether by playfully toying with mortals or trying to suppress her cravings, she seeks a way to relieve the tension building within her, enjoying the power she holds over those around her.
